title: University Staff Numbers

dataSources.name: Dept of Education Higher Education Staff Collection

notes: 2025 FTE excludes casual staff while prior years include actual casual FTE, so year-on-year FTE comparisons involving 2025 are not on a like-for-like basis. As of 2026-07 the dashboard itself makes this visible: the FTE/ratio KPI deltas are suppressed rather than shown as a misleading drop, and the trend line is dashed across the 2025 basis break. Headcount is unaffected and shown normally.
